case_title: LUIS EDUARDO VASQUEZ VS. BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. ERIBERTO FERNANDEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. COURT ACCEPTS POS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMOVED FROM EXHIBIT DESTRUCTION REPORT OF FEB. 1, 2010. SC-108, FILED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-20-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-20-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-17-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM BRAD KAPLAN FILED BY VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BAYVIEW PROPERTY MANAGERS PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW THAT DEFENDANT HAD PRIOR KNOWLEDGE OF A DANGEROUS CONDITION ON ITS PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED", PER JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY P. KAPLAN.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, LUIS EDUARDO
ORDER STAYING THE WRIT OF EXECUTION PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
